type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
The site does not dispose substance to landfill, land application or underground injection, either on the facility site or at a location off the facility site, and includes treatment at a location off the facility site prior to final disposal. 
Not sure why this question is required as clearly specified  that there are no disposals and off site transfers for recycling ...

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
The site does not the transfer this substance for recycling!
Not sure why this question is required as clearly specified  that there are no disposals and off site transfers for recycling ...
